name: Rete.js
when_to_use: 需要让用户搭建带类型端口、可编辑连线且能继续接数据流执行引擎的节点管线时用它而非手写 SVG/Canvas,因为原生在端口命中、图状态与执行拓扑同步上失败;非做静态流程图、自动布局或多人协作。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画静态节点和曲线,做不到端口约束、交互连线、可序列化节点实例与数据流求值的一致模型;Rete 将编辑器、区域、连接与执行插件放在同一图语义上。

en.when_to_use: Use it when users need to build a node pipeline with typed ports and editable connections that can later connect to a dataflow execution engine, instead of hand-writing SVG/Canvas. Native implementations fail on port hit-testing and synchronization between graph state and execution topology. It is not for static flowcharts, automatic layout, or multiplayer collaboration.
en.why_valuable: AI can only draw static nodes and curves by default. It cannot provide a consistent model for port constraints, interactive connections, serializable node instances, and dataflow evaluation. Rete puts editor, area, connection, and execution plugins on the same graph semantics.

data_in.note: Rete v2 has no generic fromJSON. boot explicitly rebuilds Node/Input/Output/InputControl/Connection with the official ClassicPreset; these field names are the trimmed import format.

position?._default: when omitted, lay out horizontally by nodes array index

controls?.initial?: string|number - defaults to empty string for text and 0 for number

connections.id?: string - generated by ClassicPreset.Connection by default
connections.sourceOutput: string - must reference the source node's outputs.key
connections.targetInput: string - must reference the target node's inputs.key

spec.note: AreaPlugin depends on explicit container geometry for translation and scaling. boot defaults to height 480px; AI may choose another pixel value. Hard rule 3 prohibits vh and percentage heights. Node positions use canvas coordinates.

data_in.note: Rete v2 没有通用 fromJSON;boot 按官方 ClassicPreset 显式重建 Node/Input/Output/InputControl/Connection,字段名就是这段裁剪导入格式。

position?._default: 省略时按 nodes 数组下标横向排布

controls?.initial?: string|number —— 默认 text 为空字符串、number 为 0

connections.id?: string —— 默认由 ClassicPreset.Connection 生成
connections.sourceOutput: string —— 必须引用源节点 outputs.key
connections.targetInput: string —— 必须引用目标节点 inputs.key

spec.note: AreaPlugin 依赖明确容器几何计算平移/缩放;boot 默认 height 480px,AI 可改其他像素值,铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。节点位置使用画布坐标。

example._why: Rete v2 不内置通用 JSON 导入,节点端口与连接端点层级高度歧义;minimal 钉死本条显式重建格式。

peer.note: 可视化必需 rete-area-plugin@2、rete-connection-plugin@2 与一种 renderer;boot 选择 @retejs/lit-plugin@2。真正执行数据流还须 rete-engine@2 并为节点实现 data(),核心 rete 包本身不自动求值。

uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;消费 AI 可把 editor.getNodes()/getConnections() 映射回本条 schema 后下载 JSON。
uplink.widget: 消费 AI 自行在明确的确认控件中把 editor.getNodes()/getConnections() 映射回本条 schema,再拼 sendPrompt 文案;本条不绑定统一事件出口。
uplink.codex: 消费 AI 自行生成同一图快照并调用 sendFollowUpMessage;本条不绑定统一事件出口。

carriers.widget: conditional:需同时加载四个 ESM 包;Area 容器位于 shadowRoot,Lit renderer 内部元素自封装,但 customElements 注册仍是页面全局一次性副作用
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + DOM/SVG/custom elements;启用 rete-engine 后仍为本地 JS,无 worker/wasm 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: @retejs/lit-plugin@2 +esm: 16x customElements.define (page-global, irreversible one-time custom-element registration; Lit elements self-encapsulate styles in their own per-element shadow roots so no document.head style leak). rete-area-plugin@2 +esm: addEventListener pointerdown x3 / pointermove x3 / wheel x1 / resize x1 for pan/zoom/drag (pointer move/up bind to document during drag); AreaPlugin.destroy cleans these up. Editor/area/connection render into the passed container, which the catalog widget boot places inside shadowRoot — works, but the customElements.define registrations remain page-global (not shadow-scoped).
